response:
Yes — **Lattice does integrate with Slack**.[1][6][9]

The integration lets Lattice post updates into Slack channels and supports features like **feedback and praise**, **feedback requests**, **review reminders**, **goal updates**, **1:1 talking points**, and **notifications**.[1][6][8] Lattice’s help center says the integration is set up by an admin in both Lattice and Slack, and it is a **read-only API connection** for pulling report outputs rather than writing back into Lattice data.[1]
